posts.text: Farmer and retired Brigadier General Shawn Harris, the Georgia Democrat in the runoff to replace MTG in Congress, joins us for coffee Saturday morning. posts.text:
Today, Justice Barrett said “Freedom of speech & freedom of religion commit us to pluralism. They commit us to tolerance. They…allow to be heard even those viewpoints that we might disagree with.”
So, what does she make of Trump, who lacks that commitment? open.substack.com/pub/joycevan...

posts.text: When the President decides photojournalists can’t take pictures at Sec’y Hegseth’s Iran briefings, it’s not a small thing. We’re connecting the dots to the larger efforts to erode our 1st Amendment rights, just when we need them the most. open.substack.com/pub/joycevan...
